qa_pairs.question: How can I obtain support or more information regarding the Alliance's Globus service?
qa_pairs.answer: You can get support or more information by sending an email to globus@tech.alliancecan.ca.

qa_pairs.question: What details should I include when emailing Globus support for an inquiry or issue?
qa_pairs.answer: When contacting Globus support, you should include your Name, Compute Canada Role Identifier (CCRI), Institution, and a description of your Inquiry or issue, making sure to indicate the sites you want to transfer to and from.
